title: telis noeana
intro: Telis noeana, also known as the Red Saltillo or Red Saltillo Sage, is a flowering plant species native to the southwestern United States. The medicinal properties of Telis noeana lie in its leaves, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, sore throats, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of using Telis noeana include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help reduce swelling, ease pain, and fight off infections. Herbal preparations of Telis noeana include teas, infusions, and topical applications, which can be made by steeping the leaves in hot water or mixing them with other herbs to create a medicinal remedy.
